description: Shared shell helper for selecting and invoking the configured LLM engine.

description: Builds the source-intake-status.v1 read model from source-adapter manifests.
notes: Read-only product/API view-model emitter for adapter contract status, locator reachability, review posture, and public-use blockers; does not fetch or import sources.

description: Builds the review-queue.v1 read model from a source SQLite database.
notes: Read-only product/API view-model emitter for pending review objects, queue filters, and approved writer commands.

description: Extracts text and metadata sidecars from local PDF inputs for collateral intake.
notes: Uses text-layer extraction or OCR fallback to write .txt and .meta.json sidecars beside the source PDF.

description: Plans local file and directory source-adapter candidates and emits normalized handoff records in dry-run mode.
notes: Read-only operational surface for validated local adapters; enumerates candidate files, reports blockers/skips, and optionally writes handoff JSONL without mutating source inputs.

description: Plans structured local source-adapter records for CSV, JSON, JSONL, and XML inputs in dry-run mode.
notes: Read-only operational surface for validated local structured-data adapters; parses local structured files, reports contextual parse diagnostics, and optionally writes normalized per-record handoff JSONL without retaining raw payload values.

description: Plans remote URL-manifest source-adapter entries from an explicit local JSONL snapshot without network access.
notes: Read-only operational surface for validated remote_url_manifest adapters; parses local manifest rows, records configured-remote posture, and optionally writes handoff JSONL without fetching URLs.

description: Plans local Git repository source-adapter metadata and emits one per-snapshot handoff record without remote operations.
notes: Read-only operational surface for validated local_git_repo adapters; inspects existing local checkouts, reports repo state and candidate path scope, and optionally writes handoff JSONL without cloning or fetching.

description: Evaluates one network-safety-gate request and emits an allow, dry-run, or refuse report without performing network access.
notes: Shared preflight gate for future live fetch or acquisition surfaces; enforces allowlist presence, rate/budget posture, robots/user-agent declarations, and dirty-worktree refusal before network execution begins.

description: Lists current product/API view-model schemas, emitters, fixtures, and validator commands.
notes: Read-only discovery surface for frontend tooling and thin adapters; fails if declared schema or emitter paths drift.

description: Validates one product/API view-model JSON payload against the local schema catalog.
notes: Dependency-free top-level contract checker for schema_version resolution, required keys, and declared top-level const/type/enum constraints.

description: Builds the subject-detail.v1 read model from a subject manifest and domain pack.
notes: Read-only product/API view-model emitter for subject identity, scope, facets, prompt bundles, templates, and retained substrate status.

description: Builds the workspace-overview.v1 read model from the topic workspace registry.
notes: Read-only product/API view-model emitter; broken workspace roots and manifests become per-workspace status instead of hidden shell failures.

description: Creates a new topic workspace scaffold and registry entry.
notes: Called by Index_New_Topic.sh to enforce workspace isolation, registry validation, and failure rollback.

description: Shared Python planner for resolving tracked crown-jewel store policy into a concrete backup manifest.
notes: Used by the shell wrapper to plan local backup and restore posture without performing the backup itself.

description: Shared Python helper for resolving topic workspace registries and concrete workspace roots.
notes: Provides registry discovery, path resolution, and workspace selection helpers for topic-neutral control-plane tooling.

description: Workspace-scoped advisory lock helper with heartbeat metadata and stale-lock quarantine.
notes: Shared lock primitive for Python tooling and shell wrappers that need per-workspace mutual exclusion.

description: Shared authority-ladder contract constants for public export gating.
notes: Keeps public export profiles, visible publication states, and blocking field-review states explicit for validator reuse.

description: Shared local-search projection and query contract constants.
notes: Keeps local/public visibility profiles, searchable review states, publication-state normalization, and schema versions explicit for builder and validator reuse.

description: Shared leak-detection helpers for search projection and results validators.
notes: Keeps secret-marker, private-path, raw-payload, private-note, and restricted-evidence field detection consistent across search safety gates.

description: Shared evidence locator/highlight contract constants.
notes: Keeps span kinds, highlight kinds, redaction postures, and schema version explicit for validator reuse.

description: Shared correction-ledger contract constants.
notes: Keeps action kinds and reference-prefix vocabulary explicit for ledger validator reuse.

description: Shared canonical graph model outline contract constants.
notes: Keeps required record families, sidecars, table mappings, and schema version explicit for validator reuse.

description: Shared static page-family query contract constants.
notes: Keeps required page families, schema version, and input-kind vocabulary explicit for validator reuse.

description: Shared request loader, shape validator, and policy evaluator for preflight network safety gating.
notes: Provides one dry-run-capable decision point for allowlist, rate-limit, side-effect budget, robots/user-agent, and dirty-worktree posture before any live network executor runs.

description: Shared leak scanner for generated artifacts, public bundles, and redacted support bundles.
notes: Provides profile-bound secret, private-path, runtime-log, prompt-output, payload, and private-note detection plus audited false-positive allowlist handling.

description: Shared publication builder for canonical-store export, public presentation, and search-backed page-family payloads.
notes: Reads canonical SQLite rows, applies conservative public-safe filtering, reuses local-search projection/results helpers, and emits deterministic export/presentation payloads for the static renderer.

description: Shared wrapper template loader, renderer, and parser for untrusted source text in LLM prompts.
notes: Keeps prompt-wrapper delimiters, metadata fields, and instruction-negation guidance explicit so hostile source text remains data rather than instruction.

description: Shared candidate-feedback plan contract constants.
notes: Keeps proposal kinds, append-only targets, review-state vocabulary, and schema version explicit for planner and validator reuse.

description: Shared field-review-state contract constants.
notes: Keeps field-review states, record-review states, evidence types, and evidence locator prefixes explicit for validator reuse.

description: Shared source-adapter manifest and handoff contract constants.
notes: Keeps input-family vocabulary, locator-key policy, handoff schema version, and rights/storage enums explicit for adapter tooling.

description: Shared helpers for building normalized source-adapter handoff records.
notes: Builds preserved-field payloads, source-specific fields, and handoff metadata without mutating source inputs.

description: Builds a deterministic local-search projection JSON artifact and FTS5 SQLite index from reviewed durable records.
notes: Read-only over the input source DB; emits one profile-specific projection artifact and one writable search index without retaining raw payloads or full extracted text.

description: Runs safe plain-text queries over a local search projection index with result classes and pagination.
notes: Read-only local search CLI over the projection FTS index; normalizes punctuation-heavy user queries into escaped term searches and optionally writes validated JSON results.

description: Builds a validated knowledge-tree export JSON artifact from a canonical SQLite store.
notes: Queries canonical rows through the shared publication builder, reuses the public local-search projection path for search_results, and writes deterministic export JSON.

description: Builds a validated public presentation JSON artifact from a knowledge-tree export.
notes: Validates the export first, applies the public presentation inventory contract, and writes deterministic public_presentation.json output.

description: Builds the full canonical-store to export to presentation to static publication chain.
notes: Writes validated export and presentation artifacts, renders the static site, persists public search sidecars, and fails closed if the final public leak scan reports findings.

description: Builds a static knowledge tree from validated export and presentation artifacts and publishes it via atomic directory swap.
notes: Renders staged HTML/CSS output, validates the generated build manifest, and preserves the previous publish directory on failure.

description: Builds a local-only public sharing bundle from validated public artifacts and red-team scans it before emit.
notes: Copies only public site artifacts plus sanitized metadata summaries, blocks leak markers before output activation, and never performs automatic upload.

description: Builds a Git/archive safekeeping manifest for a validated public sharing bundle without performing upload or remote mutation.
notes: Hashes bundle artifacts, records rights posture and preservation channels, and emits manual operator instructions for Git/archive preservation only.

description: Scans a generated directory for secrets, private paths, runtime-log leaks, prompt-output markers, and raw payload/full-text markers.
notes: Reusable local scanner with profile-bound checks, machine-readable findings, and explicit audited false-positive allowlist support.

description: Shared Python runtime logging helper used by current Python tooling.
notes: Preferred helper for new Python tools.

description: Builds the static pipeline registry SQLite DB from JSONL contracts and tracked-file inventory.
notes: Current-tree replacement for the older pre-normalization registry branch.

description: Resolves direct legacy gather facets, prompt paths, and output stems from a domain pack.
notes: Compatibility helper used by Index_Build_Place.sh outside the manifest-first adapter path.

description: Resolves typed subject manifests into concrete runtime inputs for subject builds.
notes: Current manifest-first runtime resolver for facets, domain packs, and substrate paths.

description: Shell helper that delegates workspace lock acquisition to the shared Python lock helper.
notes: Lets shell entrypoints share the workspace-lock heartbeat and stale-lock quarantine contract.

description: Evaluates the topic workspace registry and returns scheduler-eligible workspaces.
notes: Used by the scheduled workspace selector wrapper for multi-topic cron and batch loops.

description: Reviewable helper operations for authority reconciliation candidates.
notes: Supports unresolved detected entities, local authorities, candidate acceptance/rejection, ambiguous review state, external identifier enrichment, and merge preservation without deleting provenance.

description: Backfills legacy lead/entity rows into durable source/work tables.
notes: Idempotently creates work/source_access/identifier/url/entity_work/metadata/no-capture rows while marking uncertain mappings for review.

description: Append-only object-level provenance event helper for canonical source records.
notes: Records created/imported/extracted/normalized/reviewed/merged/discarded/exported and authority-candidate provenance without retaining raw payload bytes.

description: Loads and validates the controlled source relationship predicate registry.
notes: Used by schema profile validation and full-fidelity export enrichment for graph predicate labels, inverses, evidence rules, and export behavior.

description: Lists and updates review_state for durable canonical source objects.
notes: Accept/reject/demote/mark-ambiguous commands append review_state_history and provenance_event rows without deleting target objects.

description: Loads and validates the controlled source claim type registry.
notes: Used by schema profile validation and full-fidelity export enrichment for claim evidence rules, review requirements, export visibility, and confidence guidance.

description: Validates normalized confidence dimensions, score bands, and profile thresholds for canonical source records.
notes: Used by schema profile validation and full-fidelity export to keep confidence interpretable without making ingest strict.

description: Loads and enforces rights/retention policies for transient payload handling, explicit retain overrides, public export visibility, and quote eligibility.
notes: Used by schema profile validation and exporters so raw-payload/full-text retention is policy-controlled.

description: Shared validator for profile-boundary checks over loaded canonical source/work records.
notes: Keeps ingest permissive while promotion, review, export, and handoff profiles enforce required, recommended, lossy, and review-required fields.

description: Emits a read-only local installation doctor report with redacted findings.
notes: No fixer behavior, DB writes, remotes, generated artifact mutation, raw payloads, full extracted text, runtime logs, or private operator notes.

description: Seeds and reports Phase 3A source-locus discovery candidates from manually supplied local seed lists.
notes: Constrained local-only source-landscape layer; no web APIs, crawling, payload downloads, or automated acquisition.

description: Simulates source-query execution without calling external services or creating durable source rows.
notes: Phase 3C simulation-only surface; emits synthetic execution and lead-candidate reports without network access or capture side effects.

description: Validates source SQLite records against a selected schema boundary profile.
notes: Reads canonical records, applies schema-profile validation, and emits a JSON report to stdout or an output path.

description: Loads and validates the controlled canonical source type registry.
notes: Used by schema profile validation and legacy backfill to classify work_type values, provisional local types, and required downstream mapping posture.

description: Normalizes identifier scheme/value pairs into storage-safe canonical forms.
notes: Used by schema profile validation, legacy backfill, and authority reconciliation to derive normalized values, canonical URIs, and validity posture without network access.

description: Loads canonical source/work records from source SQLite for read-only export and validation helpers.
notes: Provides positive-int parsing, read-only SQLite connection setup, and multi-table record loading for schema-profile validation surfaces.

description: Shared canonical SQLite bootstrap, migration, and drift-check helper.
notes: Loads the checked-in canonical graph outline, applies forward-only local migrations, and validates table/index coverage without destructive schema changes.

description: Shared canonical-store ingestion helper for validated gather candidate batches and acquisition execution artifacts.
notes: Validates staged artifacts, creates provenance events, maps safe review-state defaults, and runs deterministic dedup, authority-reconciliation, and structured-contradiction checks through canonical_store.py without publication.

description: Deterministic canonical curation helper for exact dedup, authority reconciliation, and structured contradiction review.
notes: Normalizes identifiers and labels, reuses exact canonical work rows, records reviewable authority matches, and flags structured contradictions without deleting source claims or invoking fuzzy NLP.

description: Initializes, migrates, or checks the canonical SQLite store.
notes: Operator-facing canonical store bootstrap that records schema metadata, enforces forward-only migration policy, and validates durable table/index coverage.

description: Shared helpers for current validator entrypoints.
notes: Keeps validator support code explicit in the static registry surface inventory.

description: Validates generic JSONL input syntax for repository contracts.
notes: Current local validator runner.

description: Validates legacy subject substrate classification inputs.
notes: Current local validator runner.

description: Validates prompt fixtures that embed hostile source text inside the checked-in untrusted wrapper contract.
notes: Current local validator runner for wrapper delimiters, source provenance metadata, hazard flags, instruction-negation guidance, and hostile-text containment.

description: Validates source adapter manifests.
notes: Current local validator runner.

description: Validates source-adapter handoff JSON and JSONL artifacts across local, structured, remote-manifest, and local-Git families.
notes: Current local validator runner for shared source-adapter-handoff.v1 shape, family-specific extensions, and optional manifest-alignment checks.

description: Validates source-locus JSONL artifacts.
notes: Current local validator runner.

description: Validates knowledge-tree export JSON artifacts and public authority gates.
notes: Current local validator runner for public export structure, link integrity, and authority-ladder checks.

description: Validates public knowledge-tree presentation JSON artifacts.
notes: Current local validator runner for presentation page inventory, navigation integrity, and redaction gate coverage.

description: Validates static knowledge-tree build manifests and referenced artifact freshness.
notes: Current local validator runner for generated page and asset hashes, referenced export and presentation validation, and manifest parity checks.

description: Validates published static knowledge-tree outputs for freshness drift and internal link completeness.
notes: Current local validator runner for build-manifest freshness, required source fingerprint drift, rendered route integrity, and missing internal asset references.

description: Validates public safekeeping manifest JSON artifacts for bundle hash integrity and no-upload posture.
notes: Current local validator runner for safekeeping artifact hashes, rights posture, preservation channels, and upload-attempt forbiddance.

description: Validates append-only field-level review-state JSON documents.
notes: Current local validator runner for field-level review history fixtures and contracts.

description: Validates standalone evidence locator/highlight JSON documents.
notes: Current local validator runner for page, line, byte, structured-field, and metadata-only evidence references with public-safe redaction checks.

description: Validates append-only correction ledger JSON documents.
notes: Current local validator runner for dedupe, merge, split, and supersession history with current-vs-superseded resolution.

description: Validates canonical graph model outline JSON artifacts.
notes: Current local validator runner for canonical-graph-model-outline.v1 structure, required record families, append-only sidecars, and current SQLite table mappings.

description: Validates static page-family query contract JSON artifacts.
notes: Current local validator runner for static-page-family-query-contract.v1 structure, required page families, sparse state, visibility separation, and example coverage.

description: Validates local-search projection JSON artifacts and profile-boundary safety rules.
notes: Current local validator runner for local-search-projection.v1 structure, counts, public-profile field suppression, and private-path exposure metadata.

description: Validates local-search results JSON artifacts and safe result-shape rules.
notes: Current local validator runner for local-search-results.v1 structure, query metadata, result-class mapping, counts, and private-path suppression.

description: Validates append-only migration ledger JSONL documents.
notes: Current local validator runner for migration-ledger.v1 chronology, unique ids, version transitions, and rollback backup/snapshot references.

description: Aggregates current doctor, validator, and leak-scan outputs into one release-readiness checklist report.
notes: Pure aggregator over machine-readable upstream reports; emits pass, warn, or block posture plus actionable findings.

description: Builds a dry-run candidate feedback plan from later reviewed discoveries and current append-only sidecar posture.
notes: Reads SQLite durable candidates plus optional correction, field-review, and evidence sidecars; emits ranked append-only proposals without mutating earlier records.

description: Validates candidate-feedback-plan.v1 JSON artifacts.
notes: Current local validator runner for ranked proposal shape, reference integrity, and count consistency.

description: Shared contract constants for scheduler-failure-state reconciliation artifacts.
notes: Keeps schema version, entry version, recommendation vocabulary, and derived status values aligned across the reducer and validator.

description: Shared runtime-ledger reducer for deriving scheduler failure_state posture from terminal run outcomes.
notes: Loads per-workspace runtime-ledger JSONL, summarizes terminal outcomes by run_id, and derives healthy, retryable, or blocked scheduler posture from retry and run-budget policy.

description: Reduces runtime-ledger outcomes into scheduler failure-state recommendations and optional reconciled registry copies.
notes: Read-only by default; can emit a machine-readable reconciliation artifact and an operator-selected updated registry copy without mutating the input registry in place.

description: Validates scheduler-failure-state-reconciliation.v1 JSON artifacts.
notes: Current local validator runner for per-workspace derived failure-state posture, recommendation counts, and timestamp consistency.

description: Validates subject manifest payloads.
notes: Current local validator runner.

description: Validates topic workspace registry payloads.
notes: Current local validator runner.

description: Runs a per-topic crown-jewel backup and restore drill from a store manifest.
notes: Delegates to topic_backup_drill.py; snapshots SQLite via the backup API and records runtime-ledger events.

description: Renders a read-only static operator health dashboard from local-doctor JSON.
notes: No daemon, network dependency, forms, buttons, or write controls.

description: Runs a fast dry-run smoke across the local operator path surfaces.
notes: Uses only local read-only or temp-workspace artifacts to exercise bootstrap, runtime resolution, view builders, local doctor, and the operator dashboard without network or LLM access.

description: Builds a redacted local support bundle from read-only diagnostics and leak-scans it before emit.
notes: Support bundle handoff surface for Upkeeper/operator review; excludes raw payloads, full text, private notes, backups, caches, secrets, and private paths.

description: Shared atomic text, JSON, and JSONL write helper using temp files, fsync, and atomic rename.
notes: Preferred helper for generated catalogs, manifests, view models, and runtime reports.

description: Loads crown-jewel store manifests and evaluates fresh-backup refusal decisions.
notes: Shared helper for risky write gates over non-rebuildable assets.

description: Append-only runtime-ledger.v1 writer for command, lock, validation, artifact, backup, restore, and failure events.
notes: Can be used as a Python helper or CLI append surface.

description: Append-only migration-ledger.v1 writer and reader for schema, artifact-contract, and rollback events.
notes: Can be used as a Python helper or CLI append surface; keeps migration history separate from the general runtime event stream.

description: Centralizes SQLite integrity, quick-check, backup, checkpoint, restore-verify, and profile operations.
notes: Uses read-only checks, SQLite backup API snapshots, optional workspace locks, and treats WAL/SHM sidecars as runtime artifacts.

description: Creates a per-topic crown-jewel snapshot and verifies restore into a temporary workspace.
notes: Uses crown-jewel store manifests, SQLite safety backup, atomic manifest writes, and runtime-ledger events.

description: Validates crown-jewel-store-manifest.v1 payloads.
notes: Current local validator runner for non-rebuildable asset classification and backup-posture gates.

description: Validates crown-jewel store policy JSON artifacts for tracked store-family backup posture.
notes: Current local validator runner for backup-root path safety, duplicate store-key rejection, and store-family field completeness.

description: Validates crown-jewel-backup-manifest.v1 JSON artifacts emitted by the local backup planner.
notes: Current local validator runner for manifest timestamps, store-entry status consistency, and match-count alignment with current matched paths.

description: Shell wrapper that resolves one subject gather facet into a dry-run or live candidate batch run.
notes: Thin operator-facing wrapper around run_topic_gather.py with live execution routed through llm_runner.sh.

description: Stable subprocess bridge that exposes llm_runner.sh functions to Python callers.
notes: Sources llm_runner.sh and provides run and stamp subcommands without creating a second engine abstraction.

description: Resolves one subject runtime, renders one active gather prompt bundle, and emits a validated workspace-local candidate batch.
notes: Supports deterministic dry-run prompt rendering plus optional live execution through llm_runner.sh while keeping source acquisition and canonical persistence out of scope.

description: Validates one gather candidate batch artifact and ingests reviewable rows into the canonical store.
notes: Creates one provenance event, maps candidate types conservatively into work/source_access/source_claim/entity/relationship families, and keeps all ingested rows in proposed or needs-review states.

description: Thin script-level wrapper for the gather candidate batch validator.
notes: Preserves tools/scripts discoverability while delegating validation logic to tools/validators/validate_gather_candidate_batch.py.

description: Validates gather-candidate-batch.v1 JSON artifacts and live-vs-dry-run invariants.
notes: Current local validator runner for rendered-prompt hashes, wrapped source block accounting, llm_runner stamp parity, and noncanonical candidate posture.

description: Executes one validated source-adapter handoff into workspace-local acquisition artifacts.
notes: Consumes local or remote-manifest handoffs, records deterministic execution/capture/extraction artifacts, and keeps network-capable work behind the network safety gate.

description: Validates one acquisition execution run directory and ingests capture/extraction rows into the canonical store.
notes: Creates one provenance event, writes capture and extraction families through the canonical write API, preserves hostile-handling metadata, and remains local-only.

description: Thin script-level wrapper for the source acquisition execution artifact validator.
notes: Preserves tools/scripts discoverability while delegating validation logic to tools/validators/validate_source_acquisition_execution.py.

description: Validates source acquisition execution, capture-event, and extraction-record artifacts as one local run family.
notes: Checks execution-record shape, JSONL syntax, count consistency, run-id alignment, and capture-to-extraction reference integrity without performing canonical writes.
